title: LinkedIn Post Scraper
description: Scrape comments and reactions from LinkedIn posts

postUrls.title: Post URLs or IDs
postUrls.description: Enter LinkedIn post URLs or post IDs (e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/posts/... or 73023469261...)

sortCommentsBy.title: Sort Comments By
sortCommentsBy.description: Select the order in which comments are sorted

includeComments.title: Include Comments
includeComments.description: Whether to scrape comments on the post

includeReactions.title: Include Reactions
includeReactions.description: Whether to scrape reactions on the post

commentsLimit.title: Comments Limit
commentsLimit.description: Maximum number of comments to fetch per post (0 = unlimited)

reactionsLimit.title: Reactions Limit
reactionsLimit.description: Maximum number of reactions to fetch per post (0 = unlimited)
